item.description:

新ドキュメンタリー「POTENTIAL」明日配信

🔹中島健人がジュニアたちにエール
🔸大倉がオーデイション選考基準を明かす
🔹猪狩蒼弥らがデビューに懸ける本音を吐露

#POTENTIAL

item.title: A surge of cases of the intestinal illness that causes diarr…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A surge of cases of the intestinal illness that causes diarrhea and fatigue has been detected in 34 states. Here's how what to do if you suspect you have it and how to avoid infection. n.pr/4h8eJHm
item.content:encoded: A surge of cases of the intestinal illness that causes diarrhea and fatigue has been detected in 34 states. Here's how what to do if you suspect you have it and how to avoid infection. n.pr/4h8eJHm

item.title: A backyard venue. A sci-fi ballet. An apocalyptic art-pop al…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: A backyard venue. A sci-fi ballet. An apocalyptic art-pop album featuring WILLOW. Arc Iris have never been afraid to build something grandiose and weird.
item.content:encoded: A backyard venue. A sci-fi ballet. An apocalyptic art-pop album featuring WILLOW. Arc Iris have never been afraid to build something grandiose and weird.

item.title: Spain is back in the World Cup final for the first time sinc…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Spain is back in the World Cup final for the first time since 2010. That's also when Spain won its only World Cup title. France had hoped to reach the final for the third straight tournament. n.pr/4yEysF9
item.content:encoded: Spain is back in the World Cup final for the first time since 2010. That's also when Spain won its only World Cup title. France had hoped to reach the final for the third straight tournament. n.pr/4yEysF9

item.title: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement will pause non-urge…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement will pause non-urgent vehicle stops after two deadly shootings in less than a week, Maine U.S. Sen. Angus King's office tells NPR. n.pr/4wNTAqF
item.content:encoded: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement will pause non-urgent vehicle stops after two deadly shootings in less than a week, Maine U.S. Sen. Angus King's office tells NPR. n.pr/4wNTAqF

item.title: An accidental ethanol spill may have been the cause of the f…
item.author: DJ Mag (@djmag.com)
item.description:
An accidental ethanol spill may have been the cause of the fire that destroyed Tomorrowland’s Mainstage ahead of last year’s festival, according to a report by Het Laatste Nieuws

buff.ly/XQjtkus
item.content:encoded:
An accidental ethanol spill may have been the cause of the fire that destroyed Tomorrowland’s Mainstage ahead of last year’s festival, according to a report by Het Laatste Nieuws

buff.ly/XQjtkus

item.title: 45 years ago, Go-Go's released their debut album, 'Beauty an…
item.author: Discogs (@discogsofficial.bsky.social)
item.description: 45 years ago, Go-Go's released their debut album, 'Beauty and the Beat,' and made history as the first and only No. 1 Billboard album by an all-female band who wrote their own material and played their own instruments.
item.content:encoded: 45 years ago, Go-Go's released their debut album, 'Beauty and the Beat,' and made history as the first and only No. 1 Billboard album by an all-female band who wrote their own material and played their own instruments.
